mechanism: Suppressed FX implied vol makes options cheap (straddle ~4.5-5.5% of notional at 10% IV), improving gamma risk-reward. The current ~1.8 sigma divergence from the MOVE-FX vol regression suggests systematic underpricing of FX tail risk.
regime_dependence: Holds while FX vol remains at ~25th percentile relative to rates vol at ~65th percentile post-GFC
